name: ListPaymentsWithinSpecifiedTimeInterval
description: Search for payments within a specific timeframe by providing the starting date and the ending date. The results includes payments ids and their descriptions.

profile_id.description: The identifier referring to the profile this entity belongs to. This allows you to filter search results by a specific profile.

testmode.description: Most API credentials are specifically created for either live mode or test mode. In those cases the testmode query parameter can be omitted. For organization-level credentials such as OAuth access tokens, you can enable test mode by setting the testmode query parameter to true.
